sources.rejection_rules: node_id anti-join must be zero; non-empty summary_text; <= 5000 characters; duplicates deduplicated by feature_table, node_id, source, source_dataset, source_record_id, summary_kind
sources.validation_evidence: reproduce/19_node_sequence_text_features_summary.ipynb and docs/textual_summary_features.md: official tissue_textual_summary has 11,942 rows / 16,061 endpoint nodes (74.35%), source UBERON def fields; validation reported endpoint misses, missing text, over-max text rows 0.
sources.gap: No checked-in ontology fixture is included for this source-family; the notebook records the accepted official artifact and validation evidence without claiming live replay.

sources.historical_acquisition: No laptop replay command: the reviewed immutable embedding build is worker-only and requires exact model revisions plus source-feature checksums from the v2 candidate manifest.

outputs: official immutable embedding candidates and manifests
